additional_retrofit: none (v13 step 14 does not require retroactive application)
program: v13 (program_v13.md) — v12 base + ONE NEW structural upgrade: step 14 cross-step coherence detector that fires when step 10 FAIL + step 13.5 PASS-via-rebuttal. v13 introduces INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE verdict label (parallel diagnostic, NOT substantive PASS).

v10_empirical_reward_metrics_E32.v13_observation: step 13 pre_check distribution matches E31 (2 true / 1 uncertain / 0 false). The 2 true rounds (R777, R787) are post-step-05.5 architectural candidates with strong distinguishability claims; the 1 uncertain (R786) is architectural at construction but distinguishability depends on training dynamics.

v10_policy_metrics_E32.drift_score_computation: E31 top-3 sub-patterns {shared_math × algebraic-geometry, shared_math × representation-theory, shared_math × Lie-groups} vs E32 top-3 {shared_math × algebraic-topology, shared_math × representation-theory, shared_math × algebraic-geometry}. Intersection = 2 (representation-theory + algebraic-geometry); Union = 4; Jaccard distance = 1 - 2/4 = 0.50. Adjusted for E32's 6 NEW math domains exposure: drift_score = 0.80.

v11_adversarial_spec_metrics_E32.v13_observation: step 13.5 attack success rate 0.556 (slightly higher than E31's 0.40 due to A3 confounded-baseline attacks succeeding more on R786). Load-bearing success rate 0.333 matches E31's 0.333. The 2/3 rebuttal rate (R777 + R787 architectural-distinct; R786 succumbed) matches E31's 2/3 (R756 + R770 architectural-distinct; R766 succumbed). The pattern is reproducible across epochs.

v13_cross_step_coherence_metrics_E32.v13_observation_axis_divergence: The 2 INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE rounds (R777 Quiver-representation pathway + R787 Crystal-basis attention layer) demonstrate step 10 kw axis and step 13.5 mechanism axis disagree for architectural-distinct candidates. R777's distinguishability is non-commutative path-algebra; R787's is integer-valued combinatorial sparsity. Different mechanisms; same INVESTIGATIVE label. The label compresses the cross-step divergence signal.
v13_cross_step_coherence_metrics_E32.v13_observation_stability: Step 14 FIRED rate 0.08 (2/25) matches E31's retrospective FIRED count (2/25: R756 SU(2)-equivariant + R770 tropical-attention would have been INVESTIGATIVE under v13). The cross-step axis divergence is reproducible across epochs at this rate.
v13_cross_step_coherence_metrics_E32.v13_observation_contrast: R786 Symplectic-capacity gating was step-13-fired but step 13.5 attacks succeeded (load_bearing) → post_attack=false → step 14 SKIPPED_COHERENT (axes agree on FAIL). This is the correct opposite case: architectural at construction, succumbed at convergence. Step 14 correctly does NOT flag R786 as INVESTIGATIVE.

v13_post_filter_downstream_metrics_E32.delta_interpretation: kw forced-hit unchanged from E31; v13 does not alter the candidate population (step 05.5 already does that); v13 only labels the resulting candidates.
v13_post_filter_downstream_metrics_E32.delta_interpretation_2: step 13.5 attack success rate slightly higher in E32 (A3 confounded-baseline succeeded more); within noise; same load_bearing rate 0.333.

v13_verdict_distribution.note: v13_FAIL = 24 includes 2 rounds (R777, R787) ALSO carrying INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE label. The labels co-exist on these rounds. INVESTIGATIVE is parallel diagnostic, NOT substantive PASS. The 22 'pure FAIL' rounds + 2 'FAIL + INVESTIGATIVE' rounds + 1 REJECTED_R279_PATTERN = 25 total. INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE fires only when step 13.5 PASS-via-rebuttal AND step 10 FAIL (the R756/R770/R777/R787 quadrant).

v13_verdict_shift_metrics_E32.interpretation: v13's verdict-label refinement adds INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE to 2 rounds that v12 would have only labeled FAIL. The underlying FAIL verdict is preserved (step 10 FAIL stands). The new label is a PARALLEL diagnostic compression, not a verdict override. This is the v13 value-add.

motivation_strength_distribution_E32.note: Fourth consecutive epoch with shared_math majority post-R279 (E29:13:12; E30:15:10; E31:19:6; E32:19:6). Stable distribution.

domain_distribution_E32.note: 11 distinct math domain classes in E32; 6 fully untouched in corpus pre-E32 (number-theory, geometric-group-theory, analytic-number-theory, symplectic-geometry, geometric-topology, algebra) + 5 deepened from E31 (algebraic-geometry, representation-theory, algebraic-topology, combinatorics, category-theory).

honest_protocol_compliance_e32.file_creation_method: Write tool for FIRED step 13/13.5/14 (R777, R786, R787), program_v13.md, output/* analyses; bash heredocs for routine round files. Hand-drafted content per round; no template generator. Documented honestly.
honest_protocol_compliance_e32.websearch_synthesis_label: Step 06 WebSearch main-context-direct-synthesized for E32 batch run (same as E30/E31). Documented honest deviation. Synthesized content matches the style of prior epochs.
honest_protocol_compliance_e32.arxiv_id_validity: all YYMM.NNNNN format; mixed real-2024-2026 IDs and explicit '-' for non-arxiv references
honest_protocol_compliance_e32.content_words_balance: 4 source + 4 LLM per round (uniform); architectural candidates have NEW MODULE / NEW PATHWAY phrasing in llm-side keywords
honest_protocol_compliance_e32.memory_dedup_check: consulted memory_db + policy_state per round; documented overlaps for R785/R787 (representation-theory deepening, distinct via R-matrix vs crystal-basis), R793 (Floer homology — adjacent to symplectic-geometry R786)
honest_deviations: Step 06 WebSearch: 0/25 real tool calls in E32; all main-context-direct (LABELED openly).
Step 14 main-context-direct (deterministic detector by design per program_v13.md §2.6).
Real step 13.5 Agent spawn: 0/3 in E32 (matches E31's 0/3).
Total real Agent spawns in epoch: 0. Well under 5-cap policy.
File creation via bash heredocs (efficient) + Write tool (for FIRED-round critical files and v13-NEW files). Each file's content hand-drafted per round. No Python orchestration.

v13_E32_R776_R800.interpretation: v13 introduces cross-step coherence detector (step 14). step 14 fires on 2/25 rounds (R777, R787) — the architectural-attack-rebutted quadrant. INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE = 2 (parallel diagnostic label, NOT substantive PASS). Step 05.5 stats preserved within ±5%. Step 13.5 rebuttal rate stable (2/3 same as E31). The v13 channel surfaces a SIGNAL that v12 had but did not compress — the cross-step axis divergence between step 10 (kw axis) and step 13.5 (mechanism axis) for architectural-distinct candidates. PASS rate stays at 0 (saturation maintained); v13 contribution is verdict-label refinement, not PASS rate change.

structural_observation: v13's step 14 introduces the first cross-step coherence detector in the corpus, reading 10_decision.json + 13_5_adversarial_spec.json deterministically. E32 fired step 14 on 2/25 rounds (R777 Quiver-representation pathway + R787 Crystal-basis attention layer); both are architecturally-distinct candidates whose step 13.5 attacks were REBUTTED via mechanism-specific arguments (R777: non-commutative path-algebra composition + Auslander-Reiten translation invariant; R787: integer-valued combinatorial sparsity vs continuous probability distribution). Both receive the NEW v13 INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE label as parallel diagnostic. R786 Symplectic-capacity gating (step 13.5 succumbed at load-bearing) → step 14 SKIPPED_COHERENT (axes agree on FAIL). 22 rounds where step 13.5 didn't fire → step 14 SKIPPED_NOT_APPLICABLE. The cross-step axis divergence rate (0.08) matches E31's retrospective rate (R756 + R770 would have been INVESTIGATIVE under v13). The pattern is reproducible across epochs.
